texto: The Steadfast Love of the Lord is not Seasonal
autor: His Mercies do not have winter or summer days... They are new every now and then.
explicacao: Citação de His Mercies do not have winter or summer days... They are new every now and then. sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The Steadfast Love of the Lord is not Seasonal” articula reflexao, israelmore-ayivor, steadfast em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
